records.question: Which medicines interact with the enzyme Uroporphyrinogen III decarboxylase when its OMIM number is at least 176100?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.name = 'Uroporphyrinogen III decarboxylase' AND enzyme.omim >= 176100
records.pred_sql:
SELECT medicine.id
FROM enzyme
INNER JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction
ON enzyme.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id
INNER JOIN medicine
ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
WHERE enzyme.name = 'Uroporphyrinogen III decarboxylase'
  AND enzyme.OMIM >= 176100

JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.chromosome = '10q25.2-q26.3' AND enzyme.location = 'Cytosol' AND enzyme.product = 'Uroporphyrinogen III' AND medicine_enzyme_interaction.interaction_type = 'activitor'

records.question: Which medicines named Prazinil are not FDA approved and act as inhibitors on the ALA dehydratase enzyme located in the Cytosol associated with ALA-Dehydratase deficiency?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.porphyria = 'ALA-Dehydratase deficiency' AND medicine_enzyme_interaction.interaction_type = 'inhibitor' AND enzyme.location = 'Cytosol' AND enzyme.name = 'ALA dehydratase' AND medicine.trade_name = 'Prazinil' AND medicine.fda_approved = 'No'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    medicine.id
FROM 
    medicine
INNER JOIN 
    medicine_enzyme_interaction 
ON 
    medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
INNER JOIN 
    enzyme 
ON 
    enzyme.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id
WHERE 
    medicine.name = 'Prazinil'
    AND medicine.FDA_approved = 'No'
    AND enzyme.name = 'ALA dehydratase'
    AND medicine_enzyme_interaction.interaction_type = 'inhibitor'
    AND enzyme.Location = 'Cytosol'
    AND enzyme.OMIM IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which medicines that are FDA approved interact with the enzyme ALA synthase where the enzyme’s OMIM number is at most 125290?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE medicine.fda_approved = 'Yes' AND enzyme.omim <= 125290 AND enzyme.name = 'ALA synthase'
